nasb.text: Then the elders of the congregation said, “What shall we do for wives for those who are left, since the women are destroyed out of Benjamin?”

esv.text: Then the elders of the congregation said, “What shall we do for wives for those who are left, since the women are destroyed out of Benjamin?”

cnv.text: 會眾中的長老說：“便雅憫的女子既然都被除滅了，我們應怎樣行，使那些餘下的人有妻子呢？”

ccb.text: 会众的长老说：“便雅悯支派的女子都死了，我们应该怎么办才能使余下的人有妻子呢？
